narrative: US Nonfarm Payrolls lead the macro narrative as markets brace for jobs data volatility — DXY retreats -0.21% while equities firm +0.41%; gold lower -0.28% near $4,492; VIX 15.7. GBP/NZD bilateral divergence (+1.28% spread) remains the dominant G8 theme as NZD 1W avg falls -0.80%. Watch US NFP at 12:30 UTC for the next directional catalyst.
